name: praxis-studio
description: AI-native Product Development IDE centered on development graphs and project memory.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @praxis/core && npm run build -w @praxis/development-graph && npm run build -w @praxis/trace-recorder && npm run build -w @praxis/tool-registry && npm run build -w @praxis/repository-scanner && npm run build -w @praxis/project-profiler && npm run build -w @praxis/graph-generator && npm run build -w @praxis/graph-store && npm run build -w @praxis/local-knowledge && npm run build -w @praxis/model-router && npm run build -w @praxis/provider-deepseek && npm run build -w @praxis/prompt-registry && npm run build -w @praxis/context-builder && npm run build -w @praxis/plan-model && npm run build -w @praxis/file-generator && npm run build -w @praxis/template-generator && npm run build -w @praxis/project-wizard && npm run build -w @praxis/coding-agent-adapter && npm run build -w @praxis/agent-runtime && npm run build -w @praxis/ui-kit
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @praxis/runtime-cli && npm run build -w @praxis/studio-desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck -w @praxis/core && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/development-graph && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/trace-recorder && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/tool-registry && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/repository-scanner && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/project-profiler && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/graph-generator && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/graph-store && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/local-knowledge && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/model-router && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/provider-deepseek && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/prompt-registry && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/context-builder && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/plan-model && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/file-generator && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/template-generator && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/project-wizard && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/coding-agent-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/agent-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/ui-kit
scripts.typecheck:apps: npm run typecheck -w @praxis/runtime-cli && npm run typecheck -w @praxis/studio-desktop
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @praxis/runtime-cli && npm run tauri:dev -w @praxis/studio-desktop
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @praxis/runtime-cli && npm run tauri:build -w @praxis/studio-desktop
scripts.package:desktop:debug: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @praxis/runtime-cli && npm run tauri:build:debug -w @praxis/studio-desktop
